overallAssessment: The agent demonstrated exceptional reasoning quality. It successfully navigated complex, multi-pass constraints (Product Discovery Agent, ignoring technical/compliance details) and synthesized disparate information (pillars, raw intent, reference products) into a highly structured, actionable, and robust product strategy. The reasoning is auditable, and the leaps taken (e.g., structuring journeys and personas) are justified by the role of a product strategist. The final output is coherent and adheres strictly to the defined scope boundaries.
